auth initiates OAuth flow; callback handles the redirect response completing the flow
dual token store: reads qb_connections first, falls back to integrations; refreshes both on token renewal
dual token store: qb_connections is multi-company source of truth; integrations is legacy single-company fallback; both kept in sync on token refresh
